elements.name: Display top 5 car wash services with rating above 4 and votes above 20

embeddings.name: Display top 5 car wash services with rating above 4 and votes above 20

steps.name: I am on the IndiaMart home page
I search for "Car Wash Service" near "Chennai"
the results page should be displayed
I should see at least 5 services with rating above 4 and votes above 20
services should be sorted with highest rating on top
each service should display its name and phone number

name: Car Wash Services Search
description:
As a user
  I want to find top-rated car wash services near me on IndiaMart
  So that I can select the best rated option
